name: PT Asia Pacific Investama Tbk
summary: PT Asia Pacific Investama Tbk operates as a garments company in Indonesia, Africa, the United States, Asia, Australia, and Europe. The company operates through two segments, Garments, and Weaving and Spinning. It offers denim, grey, job work, laundry, waste, and other garments, as well as yarns. The company was formerly known as PT Apac Citra Centertex Tbk and changed its name to PT Asia Pacific Investama Tbk in November 2015. PT Asia Pacific Investama Tbk was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia. PT Asia Pacific Investama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT World Harvest Textile.
